warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
2 mins easy Row/AB
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
1x1 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 22 mins
BUILD to 1RM
00:00 5 @ 55%
03:00 4 @ 65%
06:00 3 @ 75%
09:00 2 @ 85%
12:00 1 @ 95%
15:00 -22:00 1RM  Max 3 attempts

metcon.name: Helen
metcon.description:
3 Rounds for time of:  
400m Run  
21 Kettlebell Swings, 53# / 35#  
12 Pull-ups

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Reps. Lower as slow as you can. If you can do more than 5 reps, GO SLOWER.
NO BANDS. Step up hook or bench to get to the top.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench press and pull-ups tax chest and lats heavily; target antagonists and weak points to balance and prevent imbalance.

NO BANDS. Step up hook or bench to get to the top.
Helen | 3 Rounds for time of:

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Helen. Rounds for Time: 400m Run, 21 Kettlebell Swings, 53# / 35#, 12 Pull-ups. For hypertrophy, focus on back (rows), biceps, rear delts.
